debug_info.goal:
U V : Type
h : U ∼ V
⊢ Set U ∼ Set V

proof:
by
  rw [equinum_iff_inverse_pair] at h ⊢
  rcases h with ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩
  exact ⟨image f, image g, image_comp_id hfg, image_comp_id hgf⟩

by
  rw [equinum_iff_inverse_pair] at h ⊢
  obtain ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩ from h
  exact ⟨image f, image g, image_comp_id hfg, image_comp_id hgf⟩
